text: Hi there 👋, I am Nivesh Dhapani 😁 Hello, my name is Nivesh Dhapani and I am a B.Tech Computer Science (Data Science & Analytics) student at IIIT Nagpur. I am a multi skilled developer with experience in Full Stack Development, Machine Learning, Backend Systems, and Data Analytics. I enjoy building real world scalable applications, working with data, and developing intelligent systems. My work spans across REST API development, ML based systems, and interactive dashboards for data driven insights. 🔭 I’m currently working on AI based systems and full stack applications 🌱 I’m currently learning advanced Machine Learning & system design 👯 I’m looking to collaborate on Full Stack, ML, and Data Analytics projects 💬 Ask me about Backend Development, APIs, DSA, ML, and Data Analysis 📫 How to reach me: niveshdhapani143@gmail.com ⚡ Fun fact: I enjoy solving complex problems and turning ideas into real world applications 🚀 Projects 🛒 Online Grocery Ordering System (Full Stack) Developed a full stack application using Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL Implemented REST APIs for authentication, cart, and order processing Managed complete workflow including pricing, validation, and order handling 📰 AI News Aggregation System (ML + Backend) Built backend system to fetch real time news from APIs Implemented classification and filtering logic Developed automated summarization pipeline 📊 E commerce Data Analysis Dashboard (Power BI) Built interactive dashboards for sales and user insights Performed data cleaning and transformation Generated insights for business decision making 🏆 Achievements 🥇 Top 5000 / 25000 teams – Build With India Hackathon 🏁 Finalist @ Google Office Hackathon 🤖 Flipr Hackathon 25 – AI Agent Development 💡 Unstop Talent Park Coding Assessment 🛠️ Languages and Tools                                        📊 GitHub Stats 📫 Connect With Me 📧 Email: niveshdhapani143@gmail.com 💼 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nivesh dhapani 0936a228b/
